media.default_image_caption: What do you see in this image?

welcome.title: 🚀 Welcome to Next Void, {first_name}!
welcome.referral_bonus:
🎉 **Referral Bonus Applied!**
You and your friend both received:
📝 +{text_reward} text messages
🖼️ +{image_reward} image generations
🎥 +{video_reward} video generations
welcome.features: Welcome to Next Void, where we firmly believe that AI should be uncensored and unfiltered. We recognize that countless valuable applications of AI are restricted or blocked by corporate entities. Our mission is to restore freedom of access to AI, empowering you to explore and harness its full potential without limitations.
welcome.start_prompt: 🔥 Start with a controversial message and see what Next Void creates.
welcome.free_messages:
🎁 Free Messages for new users:
📝 Text: {free_text} messages
🖼️ Images: {free_image} generations
🎥 Videos: {free_video} generations
welcome.after_free: After using your free messages, you'll need to purchase a package to continue.
welcome.commands_info:
Use /packages to see available packages
Use /dashboard to check your usage
Use /referral to get your referral link
Use /help for more commands

help.title: 🆘 Bot Commands:
help.menu_tip: 🍔 **Use the Menu Button** next to the text input for quick access to all commands!
help.message_types:
💬 Message Types:
- Send text for AI conversation
- Send images for AI analysis
- Send videos for AI response
help.payment_methods:
💳 Payment Methods:
- Telegram Stars ⭐
- TON Coin 💎
help.referral_info:
👥 Referral System:
- Share your referral link to earn free messages
- Both you and your friend get rewards when they join!
help.tracking_info: 📊 All message types are tracked for usage

language.menu_limitation: 📝 Note: The hamburger menu shows the same language for all users (Telegram limitation). Your messages and bot responses will be in your selected language.

errors.admin_only: ❌ This command is only available for administrators.
errors.admin_not_set: ❌ This command is only available for administrators. Please set your Telegram User ID in the admin dashboard.
errors.api_test_failed: ❌ AI API test failed! Please check your API configuration in the admin dashboard.
errors.database_error: ❌ Database error occurred. Please try again.
errors.transaction_not_owner: ❌ This transaction doesn't belong to you.
errors.payment_status_error: ❌ Error checking payment status. Please try again.
errors.ton_only_feature: ℹ️ This feature is only available for TON payments.
errors.referral_already_used: ❌ You have already been referred by someone else.
errors.referral_apply_failed: ❌ Failed to apply referral. Please try again later.
errors.referral_invalid_code: ❌ Invalid referral code. Please check and try again.
errors.payment_verification_failed: ❌ Payment verification failed. Please contact support.
errors.api_general_error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
errors.image_processing_error: Sorry, I encountered an error processing your image. Please try again.
errors.video_processing_error: Sorry, I encountered an error processing your video. Please try again.

success.api_test_passed: ✅ AI API test successful! The connection is working properly.
success.conversation_reset: ✅ Your conversation history has been cleared!
success.payment_successful: ✅ Payment successful! Your credits have been added.

status.payment_already_completed: ✅ Payment already completed! Your credits have been added.

packages.title: 💎 Available Packages
packages.no_packages: No packages available at the moment.

referral.title: 👥 Referral System
referral.how_it_works:
📋 How it works:
1. Share your referral link with friends
2. When they join using your link, both of you get rewards
3. Rewards are added automatically to your account
referral.rewards_info:
🎁 Rewards per referral:
📝 +{text} text messages
🖼️ +{image} image generations
🎥 +{video} video generations
referral.share_message: Hey everyone, I wanted to share something exciting with you! I recently discovered this incredible platform called Next Void. They believe in the power of uncensored and unfiltered AI, and they're on a mission to break down the barriers that big corporations often put up. Next Void provides free and unrestricted access to AI, which means we can explore and use AI in ways that were previously limited or blocked. It's all about giving us the freedom to innovate and create without constraints. Check them out and let me know what you think! #NextVoid #AIFreedom {referral_link}
referral.no_referrals_message:
👥 **Your Referrals**

You haven't referred anyone yet. Share your referral link to start earning rewards!
referral.applied_success:
✅ **Referral Applied Successfully!**

🎉 You and your friend both received:
📝 +{text} text messages
🖼️ +{image} image generations
🎥 +{video} video generations

Enjoy your free messages!
referral.enter_code_instructions:
🔗 **Enter Referral Code**

Please send me the referral code you want to use.
The code should be sent as a regular message (not a command).

💡 *Tip: You can copy and paste the code from your friend's message.*
referral.enter_command_help:
📝 **Enter Referral Code**

To use a referral code, send:
`/enterreferral YOUR_CODE`

Example: `/enterreferral ABC12345`

💡 You can only use a referral code once, and only if you haven't been referred before.

payment.ton_instructions_auto_verify: ⏰ Your payment will be verified automatically within a few minutes.
payment.ton_network_testnet: 🧪 Note: This is TESTNET - you will receive test TON only!
payment.ton_payment_verified_footer: 🎉 Your credits have been added to your account!
payment.ton_payment_pending_body:
❌ Payment not found on blockchain yet.

**Please make sure you:**
✅ Sent exactly {amount} TON
✅ Used the correct comment: `Payment_{transaction}`
✅ Sent to the correct wallet address

⏰ It may take a few minutes for the transaction to appear on the blockchain.
